intro: Isotrema yunnanense, also known as Yunnanese Helleborine, is a species of orchid native to the mountainous regions of Asia. This plant has been traditionally used in medicine for its health benefits, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant properties, making it useful in treating various ailments such as fever, cough, and digestive issues. The bioactive constituents of Isotrema yunnanense include flavonoids, alkaloids, and phenolic acids, which are responsible for its medicinal properties.
